subject: hs_physics
instructions_en: Answer 3 of 6 questions (33.33 pts each). g=10 m/s┬▓. Formula Рєњ algebra Рєњ substitution Рєњ units.
instructions_he: ОбОаОћ ОбОю 3 ОъОфОЋОџ 6. g=10 m/s┬▓. ОаОЋОАОЌОћ Рєњ ОљОюОњebra Рєњ ОћОдОЉОћ Рєњ ОЎОЌОЎОЊОЋОф.

questions.body_en:
Car at 20 m/s brakes with a=4 m/s┬▓. Truck 80 m ahead at 8 m/s.

(a) Braking distance.
(b) Collision?
(c) v-t sketch.
questions.body_he:
ОъОЏОЋОаОЎОф 20 m/s, a=4 m/s┬▓. ОъОЕОљОЎОф 80 m ОЉ-8 m/s.

(Ољ) ОъОеОЌОД ОЉОюОЎОъОћ.
(ОЉ) ОћОфОаagОЕОЋОф?
(Оњ) v-t.
questions.sample_solution_en:
(a) $v^2=v_0^2+2a\Delta x$ Рєњ $\Delta x=50$ m.
(b) $20t-2t^2=80+8t$ Рєњ no real collision; min gap 11 m at t=3 s.
(c) Sketch car decelerating, truck constant.

questions.body_en:
